rulings.Case Title: LEILA YEE et al VS. TRALEE MANAGEMENT LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 9, 2010, line 1. PLAINTIFFS LEILA YEE, LITTY PAPPACHEN'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Grant motion for judgment on the pleadings with 10 days leave to amend as to affirmative defenses 2, 4, and 13. Grant motion for judgment on the pleadings without leave to amend as to the remaining affirmative defenses (1, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18), all of which Defendants have determined to withdraw. =(302/MJM)

rulings.Case Title: TURK & EDDY ASSOCIATES, L.P. VS. MARK LAWRENCE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 9, 2010, line 8. PLAINTIFF TURK & EDDY ASSOCIATES, L.P.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny motion for summary judgment and summary adjudication. Triable issue of fact whether plaintiff has retaliated. See Declaration of Defendant Mark Lawrence in Opp. to MSJ ("Lawrence Decl."), para. 4-7, 9. Triable issue of fact regarding amount of unlawful detainer damages. Lawrrence Decl. para. 10. =(302/MJM)
